execution_history.reason: Incremental allocation adjustment lowers top-3 exposure, further decreases industry correlation, improves defensive and non-tech allocation. Ready for final analytic validation.
Incremental allocation adjustment lowers top-3 exposure, further decreases industry correlation, improves defensive and non-tech allocation. Ready for final analytic validation.

observations: Portfolio analytics show strong alpha, Sharpe (2.34), and Sortino (3.71) with controlled max drawdown (-20%). Stress scenarios confirm resilience compared to previous portfolio, but can improve beta and industry correlations marginally.

In response, adjust aggregate allocation away from highest beta/clustered tech/semis: Slightly reduce APP, NVDA, AVGO, KLAC, LRCX allocations and redistribute to BSX, JXI, NLR, GREK, FAST, VRSK, UI, and LII for more balance. A marginal decrease in NRG and PLTR limits top-3 concentration below 30%.
